top_findings.summary: The skill is hardcoded to work exclusively on a specific GitHub repository (udondon1478/Project-PS) instead of accepting repository information as user input. While the skill's purpose (analyzing and fixing CodeRabbit review comments) is legitimate, the implementation requires unrestricted access and push permissions to this fixed repository, which could allow the skill to modify code in an unrelated repository that the user may not have permission to access or intend to modify. A properly scoped skill should accept repository owner, name, and PR number as inputs rather than operating on a predetermined repository.
